display.purpose: The 'ghosted.' h1 wordmark. One use per page. Never reused.

headline.purpose: Large numeric readouts in stat cards only.

title.purpose: Drop zone labels, section headers, results header.

body.purpose: Instruction steps, tagline, error messages. Max 65ch.

label.purpose: Stat card names only. Not on every section header.

mono.purpose: @username handles and follow timestamps. The Mono Fence: no other use.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Element entrances (list items, section reveal). The primary reveal easing.

motion.name: ease-out-standard
motion.purpose: State transitions: hover, drag-over, loaded state changes.

motion.name: duration-instant
motion.purpose: Hover, border shifts, arrow translate. Feels immediate.

motion.name: duration-reveal
motion.purpose: Individual list item entrance. Per-item, staggered.

motion.name: stagger-item
motion.purpose: Per-item delay for list entrance. Capped at 900ms total.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Upload grid stacks to 1 column below this.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The Analyze CTA. Full-width, committed action. Disabled until both files are loaded.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: block; width: 100%; padding: 17px 24px; background: oklch(0.68 0.130 150); color: oklch(0.97 0 0); border: none; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), opacity 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover:not(:disabled) { background: oklch(0.72 0.130 150); } .ds-btn-primary:active:not(:disabled) { transform: scale(0.985); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.68 0.130 150); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: oklch(0.17 0 0); color: oklch(0.32 0 0); cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button (Sort Cycle)
components.description: Secondary action. Cycles sort order. Becomes accent-tinted when a non-default sort is active.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(0.22 0 0); border-radius: 6px; color: oklch(0.54 0 0); font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.10em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 7px 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s, color 0.15s, background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: oklch(0.32 0 0); color: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-btn-ghost.active { background: oklch(0.68 0.130 150 / 0.07); border-color: oklch(0.68 0.130 150); color: oklch(0.68 0.130 150); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.68 0.130 150); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Drop Zone
components.description: File upload target. Three states: default, loaded, drag-over. The loaded state communicates success via the primary signal color.
components.html:
👥
Followers
followers_1.html / .json
components.css: .ds-drop-zone { background: oklch(0.12 0 0); border: 1.5px dashed oklch(0.22 0 0); border-radius: 14px; padding: 32px 20px 28px; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s, transform 0.15s; user-select: none; } .ds-drop-zone:hover, .ds-drop-zone.drag-over { border-color: oklch(0.68 0.130 150); background: oklch(0.68 0.130 150 / 0.07); } .ds-drop-zone.drag-over { transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-drop-zone.loaded { border-style: solid; border-color: oklch(0.68 0.130 150); background: oklch(0.68 0.130 150 / 0.07); } .ds-drop-icon { font-size: 32px; display: block; margin-bottom: 12px; line-height: 1; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-drop-zone:hover .ds-drop-icon { transform: scale(1.12) translateY(-2px); } .ds-drop-label { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.97 0 0); margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-drop-hint { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.625rem; color: oklch(0.54 0 0); transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-drop-zone.loaded .ds-drop-hint { color: oklch(0.68 0.130 150); }

components.name: Stat Card (Standard)
components.description: One of three summary stats at the top of results. Standard variant for follower/following counts.
components.css: .ds-stat-card { background: oklch(0.12 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.22 0 0); border-radius: 14px; padding: 22px 16px 18px; text-align: center; } .ds-stat-num { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.875rem, 7vw, 2.75rem); font-weight: 800; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.03em; color: oklch(0.97 0 0); margin-bottom: 7px; } .ds-stat-lbl { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.5625rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.54 0 0); }

components.name: Stat Card (Hot — Not Back)
components.description: The 'not following back' count. Signal-green border and number. The emotional payload of the page.
components.css: .ds-stat-card { background: oklch(0.12 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.22 0 0); border-radius: 14px; padding: 22px 16px 18px; text-align: center; } .ds-stat-card--hot { border-color: oklch(0.68 0.130 150); background: oklch(0.68 0.130 150 / 0.07); } .ds-stat-num { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.875rem, 7vw, 2.75rem); font-weight: 800; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.03em; color: oklch(0.97 0 0); margin-bottom: 7px; } .ds-stat-card--hot .ds-stat-num { color: oklch(0.68 0.130 150); } .ds-stat-lbl { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.5625rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.54 0 0); }

components.name: User List Item
components.description: A single person who isn't following back. Links to their Instagram profile. Staggered entrance on results reveal.
components.html: @usernamefollowed Jan 15, 2024→
components.css: .ds-user-item { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; background: oklch(0.12 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.22 0 0); border-radius: 10px; padding: 13px 16px; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s, transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-user-item:hover { border-color: oklch(0.32 0 0); background: oklch(0.17 0 0); transform: translateX(4px); } .ds-user-left { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 3px; } .ds-user-handle { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.97 0 0); transition: color 0.15s; } .ds-user-item:hover .ds-user-handle { color: oklch(0.68 0.130 150); } .ds-user-date { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.625rem; color: oklch(0.54 0 0); } .ds-user-arrow { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.32 0 0); transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 0.15s; } .ds-user-item:hover .ds-user-arrow { transform: translateX(4px); color: oklch(0.68 0.130 150); } .ds-user-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.68 0.130 150); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Username filter. Focus turns the border primary-green. Inline clear button appears when value is present.
components.css: .ds-input-search { display: block; width: 100%; background: oklch(0.12 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.22 0 0); border-radius: 6px; color: oklch(0.97 0 0); font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; padding: 11px 14px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-input-search:focus { border-color: oklch(0.68 0.130 150); } .ds-input-search::placeholder { color: oklch(0.54 0 0); }

narrative.overview:
ghosted. is the screen you check late at night, alone — the one you wouldn't want open if someone walked by. The design holds that mood: a deep, unreflective black; one signal color that says something without shouting; Space Grotesk setting everything in clean, direct prose; the "ghosted." mark in Syne — the only typeface that doesn't apologize for itself.

This is a restrained system. The accent (a deep botanical green, oklch(0.68 0.130 150)) appears in fewer than 10% of any screen's surface area. Its job is to mark the loaded state, the focused element, the final tally. Its rarity is structural — when the green appears, it means something.

Motion is choreographed where it matters and absent where it doesn't. Results arrive with purpose — the list staggers in, the stats count up — because the reveal IS the moment this tool was built for.
keyCharacteristics: Pure near-black background; no tinted neutrals in architectural layers
One signal color: botanical moss green, ≤10% of any screen surface
Space Grotesk for all UI text: clean, direct, without character debt
JetBrains Mono restricted to @handles and timestamps only
Choreographed reveal: results entrance is designed, not defaulted

rules.name: The One Color Rule
rules.body: The moss signal appears in one role per element at most — border, background tint, or text. Never two simultaneously. Scarcity is structural.

rules.name: The No-Tint Rule
rules.body: void and well have chroma exactly 0.000. The brand lives in the primary color and typography. Not in the walls.

rules.name: The Two-Font Rule
rules.body: Syne appears once. Mono marks data. Everything else is Space Grotesk. If a third typeface appears, one is wrong.

rules.name: The Mono Fence
rules.body: JetBrains Mono marks @handles and timestamps only. Two contexts. Any other use is a violation.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Elements are flat at rest. Depth is value (lightness), never shadow. No box-shadows in this system.

dos: Do use oklch(0.97 0 0) (ink) on the moss signal fill — H-K effect makes it read brighter; white text is correct.
Do restrict JetBrains Mono to @handles and timestamps. The Mono Fence is hard.
Do use text-wrap: balance on the ghosted. display heading and any h2.
Do provide prefers-reduced-motion alternatives for all animated elements.
Do verify ≥4.5:1 for muted and placeholder text against the immediate surface.
Do treat numbered step circles as a one-time deliberate affordance for a real ordered sequence.
Do use scale(0.985) on the primary button :active state.
donts: Don't use Syne for anything except the ghosted. wordmark.
Don't add any chroma to void or well. Both have chroma exactly 0.000.
Don't use neon or bright green. The moss signal is botanical and desaturated — any brighter green becomes a hacker tool.
Don't build a SaaS-template layout: no feature tables, no hero-metric grids.
Don't apply Instagram-adjacent colors: no pink gradients, no purple/magenta.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't place uppercase tracked labels above sections that don't structurally need identification.
Don't add box-shadows to cards, panels, or buttons at rest.
